name: github_list_agent_tasks
description: List Copilot cloud agent tasks for the authenticated user (GET /agents/tasks). Public preview. Requires fine-grained PAT or GitHub App user token with Agent tasks repository read permission. Filters: sort, direction, state, is_archived, since. per_page 1-100 default 30, page, all_pages, max_pages. See GitHub REST agent-tasks.
